name: Launch Two Acquisition Corp.
business: Launch Two Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on May 13, 2024, formed to effect a business combination with one or more businesses. As of the filing date, it has not selected any specific business combination target and has generated no operating revenues.

exposures.sentence: We seek to capitalize on the significant technology, financial services, asset management and banking experience and contacts of Jay McEntee, our Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of the Board, Jurgen van de Vyver, our Chief Financial Officer, as well as Ryan Gilbert and Shami Patel, our advisors, to identify, evaluate and acquire a technology business in, among others, the financial services, real estate or asset management industries.
we are focusing our search on technology and software infrastructure companies whose products and services target financial services, real estate and asset management companies.

catalysts.event: Must complete initial Business Combination by October 9, 2026
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) October 9, 2026, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
